So I was in Minneapolis minding my own business, as one does. No ICE protests for me, thanks. I just wanted to escape the Texas heat for a few weeks. I met a lovely person, Mirra, while visiting a museum. She has this sweet innocent vibe, but also has interest in nude modeling. Well, I'll bite. Even SJW's can be sexy (at times). Here's the first part. I also did a late addition of a bonus video to the previous update of Emma. You might notice that I listen to an unhealthy amount of Daniel Lopatin. Check that out too. BBL.
#Mirra Jean added on Jun 20, 2026
